2323360.name: Defective Sectors
2323360.description:
After gaining remote access to the Plaza Pervium systems, your goal is to find out what preceded the chaos and reverse the lockdown.

Plaza Pervium is divided into 4 main areas which are further divided by sectors.

You'll have to get through multiple challenges throughout this place such as:

  • Heatwaves

  • Lack of light in some areas

  • Floods

  • Not getting lost

  • Corrosive fumes

  • Finding resources for building and crafting

  • Radiation

  • Energy management

FIGHT

In order to further explore this place, you'll have to fight your way through now hostile machines. Use weapons to fight, melee or ranged. Set up traps and turrets to make your job easier.

BUILD

Different areas provide you with different types of resources, you will come across some completely unfamiliar materials. Use that to your advantage and build an outpost where you can rest, use traps and turrets to defend it, don't forget to put up a sound beacon or a beacon to not lose it!

ADVENTURE

How far can you get? The map uses a combination of procedural generation and carefully planed out spaces. Special areas, biomes and more await for you to explore them. It will be a long journey.
2323360.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
